p.c: function[T0: FiniteGroup] { T0.elements.is_unique }[G]
function[T0: FiniteGroup] { T0.elements.contains_every }[G]
function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0 } = x0.contains_every }[G](G.elements)
not G.elements.contains_every or forall(x0: G) { x0 ∈ G.elements } = true
(forall(x0: G) { not G.elements.contains_every or x0 ∈ G.elements })
(forall(x0: G) { x0 ∈ G.elements })
not forall(x0: G) { x0 ∈ G.elements } or G.elements.contains_every
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not exists(k0: T0) { not x0(k0) } or not forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1) } }[G](G.elements.contains)
(forall(x0: G) { not forall(x1: G) { x1 ∈ G.elements } or x0 ∈ G.elements })
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x2) } or x0(x1) }[G](G.elements.contains, g)

goal: G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains).contains(g) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g)
G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains).contains = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains

p.c: function[T0: lib(group).Group](x0: lib(subgroup).Subgroup[T0]) { subgroup_constraint[T0](x0.contains) }[G](stabilizer[G, X](a, x))
function[T0: FiniteGroup](x0: List[T0]) { (x0.is_unique and subgroup_constraint[T0](x0.contains)) = FiniteSubgroup.constraint[T0](x0) }[G](G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains))

not FiniteSubgroup.constraint[G](G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains)) or (G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains).is_unique and subgroup_constraint[G](G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains).contains))

not (G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains).is_unique and subgroup_constraint[G](G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains).contains)) or FiniteSubgroup.constraint[G](G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains))

function[T0: FiniteGroup](x0: List[T0]) { not FiniteSubgroup.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: FiniteSubgroup[T0]) { FiniteSubgroup.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[FiniteSubgroup[T0]](k0) } }[G](G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains))

goal: finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x).elements = G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains)

p.c: function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1) { FiniteSubgroup.new[T0](T0.elements.filter(stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1).contains)) = Option.some[FiniteSubgroup[T0]](finite_stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[G, X](a, x)

function[T0: FiniteGroup](x0: FiniteSubgroup[T0], x1: List[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSubgroup[T0]](x0) != FiniteSubgroup.new[T0](x1) or x0.elements = x1 }[G](finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), G.elements.filter(stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains))

goal: exists(k0: G) { G.elements.contains(k0) and a.act(k0, x) = y }

goal: list_set[X](finite_orbit_list[G, X](a, x)).contains(y) = orbit[G, X](a, x).contains(y)

p.c: exists(k0: X) { k0 ∈ orbit[G, X](a, x) != k0 ∈ list_set[X](finite_orbit_list[G, X](a, x)) }
let w0: X satisfy { w0 ∈ list_set[X](finite_orbit_list[G, X](a, x)) != w0 ∈ orbit[G, X](a, x) }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != List.cons[T0](x2, x3) or (x0 = x2 and x1 = x3) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: List[T0]) { x0 = x0 and x1 = x1 } }
function[T0, T1: FiniteGroup](x0: MulAction[T1, T0], x1: T0) { map[T1, T0](T1.elements, function(x2: T1) { x0.act(x2, x1) }).unique = finite_orbit_list[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[X, G](a, x)
